title: mini-vfx
description: Small serverside effects for dropped items and more!
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated on modrinth!
# See https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mini-vfx for the latest version!


Serverside visual effects for dropped items and small particle effects for campfires, jukeboxes and torches!

You can enable effects and change the color for specific items in `config/mini-vfx.json`
![drops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nRbtqf92/images/9867b327a4b1cc8a9d708e47eb394f159674420c.gif)

The mod uses a custom item model for high-tier item drops by default and thus needs to have [polymer's autohost functionality enabled.](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/). 

The custom model part can be disabled in the configs.
